name: Eagle's Banana Creme Pie
recipeIngredient: 14 ounces Eagle Brand Sweetened, Condensed Milk (DO NOT USE MILK)
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve cornstarch in water in a heavy saucepan.
2. Stir in sweetened condensed milk and egg yolks. Cook until thickened and bubbly, stirring constantly.
3. Remove from heat; stir in margarine and vanilla.
4. Slice 2 bananas; dip in lemon juice and drain excess liquid.
5. Arrange slices on the bottom of the prepared crust.
6. Pour filling over bananas; cover with remaining custard mixture.
7. Chill for 4 hours or until set.
8. Spread whipped cream evenly over top.
9. Slice remaining bananas; dip in lemon juice, drain, and garnish the top of the pie.
10. Refrigerate leftovers.
